meaning: v.(与某人)商议,谈判,磋商,,买卖,让渡(支票、债券等),通过,越过
examples: Opposition grew and the government agreed to negotiate.
Western governments have this week urged him to negotiate and avoid force.
The continued fighting threatens to undermine efforts to negotiate an agreement.
U. has agreed to negotiate with individual countries, rather than with the Andean Community as a bloc.
Big purchasers get better pricing because when you buy in bulk you can negotiate a better price.
